description: Add DBSCAN spatial clusters visualization to the Clustering page, model performance metrics to Credit Scoring page, and counterfactual explanations to UMKM detail page.
steps: Create frontend/lib/dbscan-data.ts with DBSCAN cluster data: summary (408 clusters, 0.31% noise ratio), top 10 densest spatial clusters (cluster_id, centroid lat/lng, n_umkm, avg_score, dominant_jenis_usaha), density by kabupaten data for bar chart.

Create frontend/lib/model-performance-data.ts with model performance metrics from executive_summary.json: AUC-ROC 0.8303, KS Statistic 0.6607, Location Scoring R2 0.9999, plus comparison table data for both models.

Update frontend/app/(dashboard)/clustering/page.tsx to add a K-Means | DBSCAN toggle at the top. When DBSCAN is selected, show: summary stats card (408 clusters, noise ratio), top 10 densest clusters table, density by kabupaten bar chart (using Recharts BarChart), and a note explaining DBSCAN vs K-Means differences. Keep existing K-Means view as-is.

Update frontend/app/(dashboard)/credit-scoring/page.tsx to add a 'Model Performance' section at the bottom. Show gauge-style meters for AUC-ROC (0.8303) and KS Statistic (0.6607) using simple CSS/SVG arcs or progress bars. Include a comparison table of Location Scoring XGBoost vs Credit Risk Logistic Regression models with their key metrics.

Add a 'counterfactuals' field to UmkmDetail interface in frontend/lib/umkm-detail-data.ts. Each UMKM profile gets 2-3 counterfactual items with structure: { feature: string, current: number, target: number, impact: string }. Examples: 'Jika infrastructure score naik 20 poin -> skor potensi naik ~13 poin'.

Update frontend/app/(dashboard)/umkm/page.tsx UmkmDetailView to add a 'How to Improve' card section showing counterfactuals with before/after horizontal bars (current value vs potential value) using simple styled divs.
acceptance_criteria: Clustering page has a working K-Means/DBSCAN toggle that switches between the two views
DBSCAN view shows summary stats, top 10 clusters table, density bar chart, and explanatory note
Credit Scoring page has Model Performance section with visual gauges for AUC-ROC and KS statistic
Credit Scoring page shows model comparison table
UMKM detail view shows counterfactual 'How to Improve' section with before/after bars
pnpm test:ci passes all existing tests
findings: Build and tests pass successfully. All 6 steps implemented: DBSCAN data file, model performance data file, clustering page with K-Means/DBSCAN toggle, credit scoring page with gauge meters and model comparison, counterfactuals added to all 50 UMKM entries, and How to Improve section in UMKM detail view.
